programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items 'lost' in people's homes

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's traffic-school students complain they are fed up with his class, so he resorts to teaching them using a puppet - an innovation that proves far from boring. American comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A discovery makes Ray worry about his mortality - and prompts him to compile a list of things he wants to do before he dies. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay goes back to two restaurants - Giuseppi's and Sante La Brea - to check in with the owners he helped in the past and find out whether his advice has been put to good use. Will he be pleased with their progress? Plus, an update on Finn McCool's from season one

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jane and Martin wants a holiday home in the coastal town of Portimão in the Algarve - but Ben Hillman needs to find properties suitable for the couple and their beloved dog Bailey

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Michelle from Greater Manchester want to find the perfect place to spend their retirement on Spain's beautiful Costa Cálida, famous for its year-round warmth and relaxing atmosphere. The pair would like a secluded property within walking distance of shops and restaurants, so Jonnie Irwin shows them five such properties within their budget of £60,000

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke returns to unlock the potential of old houses. He meets teachers Simon and Sofie, whose 1930s Liverpool semi has lost its way thanks to a small kitchen squeezed into what would have been the wash house and some dodgy interior design choices made by the previous owner. Can he come up with a structural redesign and interior scheme with just £15,000? He also visits a medieval farmhouse in Kent that's like a perfectly preserved time capsule and needs an upgrade suitable for a young and rapidly growing family

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode features three people who experienced incredible adventures when they were younger, and how they had to adjust when life threw them off track. Barbara is rushed into St George's with a dangerously high heart rate, after the 74-year-old became dizzy while out shopping. Her daughter Ana discusses her mum and dad's phenomenal success in the jazz world, and how all that changed when Barbara was diagnosed with Parkinson's. John is brought into hospital, having woken up unable to move his right leg. Doctors are concerned he may have suffered a stroke. John shares tales of his glamorous life on the airlines in the 1960s

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present Bread Week, which kicks off with a sweet and savoury signature round. For the technical challenge, the bakers are asked to create a tribute to the NHS, while the Showstopper is an ambitiously artistic challenge featuring decorative designs in bread. Judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood sample their efforts, and choose this week's Star Baker - and this week's departing contestant

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by judge Paul Hollywood, presenter and comedian Judi Love and comedian Aisling Bea to discuss the best bits from Bread Week. Plus, the latest baker to leave the competition tells all, regular contributor Tom Allen invites a select group of home bakers to show off their skills and Jo rifles through photos of the curious monstrosities viewers have created in their kitchens

programme.title: Grayson Perry's Big American Road Trip
programme.desc: Grayson travels through the swing state of Wisconsin in the American Midwest - a predominantly white and predominantly rural location, and one of the states that gave President Trump his victory in 2016. He finds a state that is increasingly bitterly divided over identity politics and hot-button cultural issues like abortion and vaccination. Why are these 'culture wars' happening, asks Grayson, and what might help to overcome the divisions? To conclude the series, Grayson makes a map of the American culture wars, one which has strong implications for our own cultural and political divisions in the UK

programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Rough Guide to the Future
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud sends three celebrities around the world to take a light-hearted look at technical solutions to some of the planet's biggest issues. Jon Richardson is in America to learn about the latest advances designed to prolong life, and Phil Wang goes to China to explore how technology is enabling new ways for people to earn a living. In Japan, Alice Levine learns about the robots that are becoming as advanced as humans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business manager Ross Chapman hosts the first dinner party in west Lancashire, but encounters a string of culinary disasters while preparing his fish-themed menu. However, he still finds time for a manicure and bubble bath before the meal, and it is the behaviour of one of his guests, rather than his burnt tart, that causes the most embarrassment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Single mother Lindsay Pulford hosts the second party in west Lancashire, hoping to impress her fellow diners with a Caribbean-themed night. However, as soon as the guests arrive, they begin to regale her with reminders of her antics the previous evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: History student and part-time bartender Chris Mosey hosts the third dinner party in west Lancashire. He is confident about his cooking skills and has designed a menu that includes blue cheesecake and Scouse tapas

programme.desc: Cleaner Louise Dee hosts the penultimate dinner party in west Lancashire and provides her guests with a Spanish-inspired menu and an 'old skool rave' before her rivals give their thoughts on the evening

With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed £7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection from the perspectives of debtors, creditors and those who collect the payments. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team discovers the garage hideout of a gang of burglars in a country lane, and pursues a BMW driver who endangers his life by running across four lanes of a dual carriageway to escape with a suspicious package. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team looks into a raid on a naval base, and Dr Cyril Taft - the surgeon who saved Gibbs' life - experiences the thrill of assisting on an investigation. Assigned to treat Gibbs' suspect, Taft manages to uncover evidence that may prove crucial to solving the case. Meanwhile, DiNozzo pays his old flame Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan. Guest starring John Cryer and Scottie Thompson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An American couple are attacked in Iraq, in the very same spot a group of US Special Ops snipers were ambushed six months earlier. Determined to get to the bottom of the case, Gibbs is forced to speak to Aaron Davis, the only survivor of the first assault, who is now struggling through PTSD at the Walter Reed Medical Centre. The 300th episode of the military crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man who served as a juror in the trial of a mobster is shot dead at a baseball game, leading to a battle of wills between McCoy and his long-time friend - the suspect's attorney. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a drug addict is discovered in the yard of a daycare centre, and evidence reveals she was the heiress to the fortune. However, suspicions are raised when the family's lawyer gets power of attorney over the trust fund. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An abortion clinic doctor is murdered, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, they begin to suspect members of a radical movement led by a former priest, who appears to have no sympathy for the man's fate. Starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into three murders in the offices of a magazine places the detectives in the middle of a fierce family feud, involving a protective matriarch, warring siblings and a corrupt judge. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to find out who was responsible for sabotaging a robotic vehicle that caused the death of a Navy lieutenant and almost killed Abby. Meanwhile, Ziva's suspicions are aroused by the discovery that Tony is repeatedly visiting the hospital. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Michael Weatherly, Cote de Pablo and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead marine intelligence officer in a motel room sets the team off on a hunt for her killer. Although the town's authorities have allegedly already investigated the crime, Gibbs is determined to conduct his own thorough inquiries - which may lead him to a terrorist cell. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine major is found dead in an underground maintenance room, having scratched out one of his own eyes - and the presence of a webcam suggests someone watched him die. The team investigates with the help of Lt Col Hollis Mann, and links the case to wanted terrorist Mamoun Sharif, an old adversary who is threatening to unleash a chemical attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents try to track down an arms dealer who has the launch codes for the Navy's encrypted satellite defence system and is offering them to the highest bidder. In an attempt to win the confidence of the buyer, Ducky poses as an ageing Englishman trying to sell the information. Guest starring Armand Assante, with David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of two. ADA Stone blames himself for the shocking verdict in Sam's case, and before Benson can offer help, Sam makes a tragic decision. Mariska Hargitay stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a high-school teen is gang-raped at a rock concert, Amaro finds himself trying to save the reputation of the prime suspect, an army veteran with Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder and a fragmented memory of exactly what happened on the night concerned. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars alongside Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two surprise sniper attacks on the NYPD leave the SVU squad scrambling for answers. When the link between the shootings appears to be Detective Tutuola, he reconnects with his former Narcotics partner to uncover a possible motive tied to their old cases. As the violence continues, Lieutenant Eames joins the investigation and the unit races to hunt down a killer no one saw coming

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a surgeon who provided deaf patients with controversial cochlear implants. After ruling out the involvement of a rival doctor, the detectives suspect a radical deaf playwright may be responsible for the crime. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A married astronaut is suspected of killing his lover, a female colleague who was murdered while speaking at a conference - but Goren and the team also have to consider that she may have been killed by a rival whose seat she took on a future mission. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe, with Tate Donovan and Amy Ryan

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.desc: A wealthy Wall Street stockbroker's death looks like suicide, but Logan suspects otherwise and pins the blame on the man's protege. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hidden anti-Semitic message in a high-school yearbook offers an insight into the murder of an art teacher, and the subsequent case leads McCoy into conflict with 'Klan lawyer' Roy Payne

However, Abby discovers a message written in blood on a laminated card found at the scene and realises he was murdered. Meanwhile, Jimmy continues to pursue a relationship with Agent Michelle Lee

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A nuclear power plant inspector suffers radiation poisoning, forcing the team to consider the possibility that a foreign power deliberately targeted him. As the others investigate, Ziva spends time with the ailing victim - and begins to realise she is developing feelings for him. Drama, guest starring Matthew Marsden, with Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas - so Tony and Ziva assume their identities and keep a rendezvous at a luxury hotel in a bid to discover who they had been sent to kill. Unfortunately, Gibbs finds out his team is not the only one working on the case. Drama, with Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A comatose woman is found clinging to life in a rowboat after an assault on the East River near the mayor's home. The victim's condition leads to a complex investigation reconstructing her recent activities, and the detectives' findings uncover some surprising results. Richard Thomas (The Waltons) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After making a seemingly routine arrest of a man exposing himself in Central Park, Rollins has a bad feeling that they could be dealing with far more than a minor public offender and calls upon ADA Barba and the entire SVU squad to investigate. A shocking theory comes to light and the situation rapidly escalates, and Benson is put in mortal danger

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An infant ingests cocaine that has been mixed into baby food but Internal Affairs blocks the investigation, so the team goes undercover to expose a drug ring run by corrupt cops. Stabler is consigned to desk duty after a major operation takes a turn for the worse and he is forced to shoot a suspect in self-defence. However, Cragen and Benson uncover a smuggling racket as they pursue the case

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A billionaire's stepson drops dead on a dance floor, the apparent victim of a deliberately administered drug overdose, and suspicion initially falls on his mother, a former stripper and model - but she too is later killed. Drama, starring Chris Noth, with Kristy Swanson and Arrested Development's David Cross

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames discover a scrapbook belonging to a serial killer on death row, the contents of which suggest he may have claimed more victims than was previously thought. Guest starring Roy Scheider (Jaws) and Rita Moreno (West Side Story)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites the suspects of a 25-year-old murder case to try to put an end to the mystery once and for all - but the exercise leads to more grim consequences. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, with Donald O'Connor and Anne Francis

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Maggie McCauley, Jessica's former student and now the producer of a TV police show, gets involved in a heated argument with the network programmer who is planning to cancel the series. programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of old friend and New York police officer James O'Malley, who is investigating a suicide he believes was actually a murder. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former jewel thief and Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton spends a romantic evening with a woman, only to find himself the prime suspect in a puzzling murder. A coin collector is found dead and the sleuth must try to prevent an injustice being done. Keith Michell guest stars, with Angela Lansbury and Dina Merrill

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to her cousin's wedding, but the groom is murdered well before he reaches 'till death us do part'. The amateur sleuth immediately sets out to unmask the culprit and wonders whether the gruesome event could be linked to the release of the bride's brother from a psychiatric institution. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After a great many successful investigations, Jessica Fletcher takes a back seat for this episode, bringing her old British MI6 agent friend Michael Haggerty to the fore as he travels to Sicily and looks into a bizarre case of a double and triple-cross involving the widow of a Mafia gangster

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: First part of the pilot episode of the whodunit series, starring Angela Lansbury as a widow with a penchant for solving crimes. Jessica Fletcher is invited to a costume party where a private investigator dressed as Sherlock Holmes is found dead in the swimming pool - and her nephew Grady becomes the prime suspect in the case

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part pilot episode, in which Jessica Fletcher continues her investigation into the mystery surrounding the death of a party guest dressed as Sherlock Holmes, found floating in her publisher's swimming pool. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Four sisters claim their father died on a boat trip during a storm, but with their stories changing constantly, Jessica's suspicions grow and she tries to ascertain whether they are guilty of killing him to benefit from a $100million inheritance. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Tom Bosley and Howard Duff

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to San Francisco for her niece's wedding, but finds herself trying to prove the groom innocent of murder when he is accused of killing his boss, who had been refusing to pay him. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury, Jeff Conaway and Martin Landau

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Hollywood in an effort to stop a sleazy producer turning her first novel The Corpse Danced at Midnight into a steamy film - but she finds herself the prime suspect when he is found dead on stage. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury and John Saxon

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher joins a fox hunt at her cousin's estate, but it is not long before the host is killed in a mysterious accident - and the writer takes it upon herself to find the culprit. Guest starring Jared Martin, Lynn Redgrave, Dan O'Herlihy and Forrest Tucker, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: William Lewis holds Benson in captivity while the squad desperately searches for clues to her location, and as days pass by, it seems increasingly unlikely they will find her - but a string of rapes and murders finally gives them a clue. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A young boy is abandoned in Times Square, and leads the detectives to the house where his family lives. Inside they find a locked basement where more victims await rescue, and the team works to solve a litany of decades-old cases. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A janitor violently attacks a school coach, but the SVU team uncovers mitigating circumstances, connecting his behaviour to a history of sexual abuse. They identify more victims of the same predator, including a prisoner Reggie Rhodes (Mike Tyson) on death row. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: FBI agent Dana Lewis suspects that a 25-year-old rape-murder case in New York is connected to several unsolved crimes across the country and joins the SVU to investigate. Lewis relentlessly pursues her prime suspect, but Benson and Amaro have their doubts about his guilt. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan begins to investigate the murder of a police recruit, but the death of a casual girlfriend leaves him too distracted to concentrate, and he bows out of the case. In his absence, Eames steps in to assist Wheeler - and together they follow the trail of evidence to a surprising suspect. Drama, starring Chris Noth, Julianne Nicholson and Kathryn Erbe

Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver's Feed Me Better campaign seems to be heading off the rails, with only 20 per cent of the teenagers eating his nutritious meals. programme.title: Bright Young Things (2003)
programme.desc: A would-be writer tries to raise enough money to marry his sweetheart, but a lost manuscript and several unlucky bets put his goal out of reach. Desperate to turn matters round, he launches himself into 1930s high society, hoping to curry favour with the rich and influential. Comedy based on Evelyn Waugh's Vile Bodies, directed by Stephen Fry and starring Emily Mortimer, Stephen Campbell Moore, James McAvoy and Michael Sheen

programme.title: Music Within (2007)
programme.desc: The true story of Richard Pimentel, a brilliant public speaker with a troubled past, who returns from Vietnam severely hearing-impaired and finds a new purpose in his landmark efforts on the behalf of Americans with disabilities. Biographical drama, starring Ron Livingston, Melissa George and Michael Sheen

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

Comedy adventure, starring David Niven, Toshiro Mifune, Hardy Kruger and Ivan Desny

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow experiences what New York was like at the height of the Industrial Revolution. Millions fled to escape the persecution, poverty and famine of 19th-century Europe, only to be confronted by living conditions worse than those they had left behind. He explores the overcrowded slums of Lower Manhattan, which were a breeding ground for cholera and typhoid, and has a go at cooking using clothes dye and floor cleaner - ingredients that were added to meals to disguise the smell of spoiled meat. He also discovers how certain feats of engineering transformed not only the city, but the world

programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: The dinner ladies threaten to walk out as Jamie Oliver calls on their services to cook unfamiliar food from scratch and provide more than 20,000 dinners across one London borough. His bid to prove the new regimen will work on a large scale leaves the children initially suspicious of his food, but the time has come to tackle the government about school meals

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Maeve (1981)
programme.desc: A woman returns to her roots in Belfast after several years away. Her return leaves many of the people she left behind wrestling with unresolved issues from the past, while she is also forced to confront old memories. Drama, starring Mary Jackson and Mark Mulholland

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's grandfather is discovered frozen alive. Once he is released from the ice, he sets out to get revenge on a giant and steal his treasure

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Exploring assumptions about the origins of American popular music, including the belief that drums were brought to the USA by enslaved people from the coastal regions of Africa. The programme travels to Austria, Texas and the edge of the Sahara desert to uncover the real story behind the theories

programme.title: Anoop and The Elephant (1972)
programme.desc: Two English children meet an Indian boy and his pet elephant, and help to keep the animal out of the hands of a greedy circus owner. Family drama, with Anoop Singh and Phil Daniels

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Bloomfield (1970)
programme.desc: An Israeli footballer nearing the end of his career is tempted to accept a bribe to throw his final game. A devoted young fan and a woman who is in love with him prick his conscience, but even if he chooses to do the right thing, his failing skills may not be enough to triumph over younger, fitter opposition. Sporting drama based on Joseph Gross' novel, co-directed by and starring Richard Harris, with Romy Schneider and Kim Burfield

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing New Cross, Eltham and Catford. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines the key role played by royalty in smoothing the path to the Anglo-Russian entente of 1907, and the part played by the Kaiser's erratic, unstable personality in the growing isolation of Germany in the years leading up to 1914. The film also explores the roles played by the German, British and Russian monarchs in the months leading up to the outbreak of the First World War and tells the story of George V's refusal to grant his cousin Nicholas II asylum in England following the Russian Revolution of 1917

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks into the past of Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse, which is located close to the dormant volcano Arthur's Seat. Events in the royal residence, one of the smallest palaces in Britain, have determined the futures of England, France and Scotland, and it was the last place in which a royal prince challenged the right of an English king to sit on the throne. Fiona also examines objects including the Darnley jewel, which features numerous hidden messages, and the needlework of a doomed queen

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients suffering with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, to find out to what extent specially tailored food treatment programmes can help. Specialist dieticians aim to integrate certain food in the patient's diet to assess the beneficial health properties of food, while simultaneously discrediting widely-held old wives' tales.

programme.title: Budding Business
programme.desc: Millions are being made Australia's medicinal marijuana business and entrepreneurs are riding the 'pot stock' boom. But with patients struggling to access cannabis products who is it benefitting?

programme.title: Lost in London (2017)
programme.desc: In a recreation of a true story, the first film beamed live to cinemas as it was shot, actor Woody Harrelson embarks on a wild night out in London. He bumps into friends like Owen Wilson and Daniel Radcliffe before ending the night in prison. Comedy filmed in one-take by director and star Harrelson, with Eleanor Matsuura

programme.title: Erskineville Kings (1999)
programme.desc: A man who fled his home town to escape his abusive father decides to return once he receives word that the old man is dead. However, he faces a bitter reunion with the brother, who stayed behind to care for their father in his last days, and his ex-girlfriend, whom he abandoned with no explanation. Drama, starring Marty Denniss, Hugh Jackman and Joel Edgerton

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: Jamie's School Dinners
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver's Feed Me Better campaign seems to be heading off the rails, with only 20 per cent of the teenagers eating his nutritious meals. With just six weeks to spread his message across the London borough of Greenwich, he decides to ban the junk food, making his healthy dishes the only choice, and whisk the 60 cooks away to army training camp to learn how to prepare dinners the Jamie way

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks into the past of Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse, which is located close to the dormant volcano Arthur's Seat. Events in the royal residence, one of the smallest palaces in Britain, have determined the futures of England, France and Scotland, and it was the last place in which a royal prince challenged the right of an English king to sit on the throne. Fiona also examines objects including the Darnley jewel, which features numerous hidden messages, and the needlework of a doomed queen

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy set in a DIY shop where the customer is always wrong. Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz star

programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner
